description:
The openscap-scanner package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install openscap-scanner
rationale:
<tt>openscap-scanner</tt> contains the <tt>oscap</tt> command line tool. This tool is a
configuration and vulnerability scanner, capable of performing compliance checking using
SCAP content.
ocil_clause: the openscap-scanner package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the openscap-scanner package is installed: 
$ rpm -q openscap-scanner
fixtext:
To install the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package openscap-scanner run the following command:

$ sudo dnf install openscap-scanner
srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the openscap-scanner package installed.
title: Install openscap-scanner Package
